title: The Federalist Papers
author: Alexander Hamilton, James Madison, John Jay
content: “If men were angels, no government would be necessary.”

title: A Vindication of the Rights of Woman
author: Mary Wollstonecraft
content: “I do not wish them to have power over men; but over themselves.”

title: The Protestant Ethic and the Spirit of Capitalism
author: Max Weber
content: “Waste of time is thus the first and in principle the deadliest of all sins.”

title: The Varieties of Religious Experience
author: William James
content: “The greatest discovery of my generation is that a human being can alter his life by altering his attitudes.”

title: Principia Mathematica
author: Isaac Newton
content: “To every action there is always opposed an equal reaction.”
